title: Instagram caption style
text: sunset vibes never get old. can't wait for summer. blessed and grateful. coffee first, talk later. #goals #mood #weekend

tips.text: Period or no period — both common

tips.target: sunset vibes never get old. can't wait for summer.

tips.text: Hashtag cluster at end is the standard format

tips.target: blessed and grateful. coffee first, talk later. #goals #mood #weekend

character_tips.anna: Instagram captions follow a rhythm: thought + thought + hashtags.
character_tips.maxim: Photo captions = quick prose. High-volume daily writing.
character_tips.klavochka: Sharing a moment with words, my treasure ✨
